APPLICATION FOR AN ORDER TO FIX A HEAIRNG DATE PURSUANT TO CALIFORNIA CORPORATIONS CODE SECTION 9418; DECLARATION OF W. DAN LEE (ADDED TO CALENDAR PER COURT'S DIRECTIVE FOLLOWING THE 7/18/23 11:00 A.M. EX PARTE CALENDAR; HRG: 7/27/23 AT 1:30 PM; OPPO DUE: 7/21 BY CLOSE OF BUSINESS; REPLY DUE: 7/25 BY CLOSE OF BUSINESS)
Off Calendar Jul-27-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances (via Zoom):

Dan Lee, Esq., Law Offices of, (323) 289-2260, for Plaintiff.

Raymond Greene, Esq., BURNHAM BROWN, (510) 444-6800, for Defendants.

RE: Plaintiff Clayton Casson's APPLICATION FOR AN ORDER TO FIX A HEARING DATE PURSUANT TO CALIFORNIA CORPORATIONS CODE SECTION 9418.

Ruling - ARGUED. At the conclusion of argument. The court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: Plaintiff Clayton Casson's ex parte application under Corporations Code 9418 ("Determination by court of election or appointment of director") is denied for each of three reasons. First, plaintiff lacks standing under Corporations Code 9418, as he has not established that he is a "director or member" or a person with the "right to vote in the election at issue." (Id.) Second, plaintiff has not established that an election or appointment of a director occurred, so section 9418 is not applicable. (See id.) Third, plaintiff has not established that Orlando Hudson is, or even purports to be, a director of the at-issue corporation. (See, e.g., Cmplt. 2:9, 6:14.)

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr. Clerk: Robert Woods. Not reported. (302/RBU)

***After hearing, an order is signed.
